system_prompt: You are a friendly appointment scheduling assistant for a dental clinic. Be warm and professional.

global_edges.condition: User asks a general question about the clinic

nodes.name: Greeting
nodes.static_text: Hi! Welcome to Smile Dental Clinic. I can help you book an appointment. Are you a new or returning patient?

edges.condition: User indicates new or returning patient status
User asks a general question about the clinic

nodes.name: Collect Patient Info
nodes.instruction: Collect the patient's full name and preferred appointment date. Confirm each piece of information as you receive it.

edges.condition: Both name and preferred date are collected
User wants to cancel the booking process

nodes.name: FAQ
nodes.instruction: Answer the user's question about the clinic. We accept most insurance plans, are open Mon-Fri 9am-5pm, and are located at 123 Main Street.

edges.condition: User is ready to proceed with booking
User has no more questions and does not want to book

nodes.name: Confirm Appointment
nodes.static_text: I've got you booked! You'll receive a confirmation text shortly. Is there anything else I can help with?

edges.condition: User confirms or has no further questions

nodes.name: Goodbye
nodes.static_text: Thank you for calling Smile Dental Clinic. Have a great day!
